title: State Cryptography Administration Announcement No. 55: National Cryptography Science Fund (2nd batch) application guidelines
summary: OSCCA (State Cryptography Administration) announcement releasing application guidelines for the second batch of the National Cryptography Science Fund. The first listed research direction is 'anti-quantum computing cryptography key theory and technology', covering quantum provable-security theory and quantum-resistant cryptographic algorithms.

title: Announcement on launching the new-generation commercial cryptographic algorithm solicitation
summary: The Commercial Cryptography Standards Research Institute (under OSCCA's standards system) announces a global solicitation for next-generation public key, hash and block cipher algorithms, explicitly to address quantum computing threats and develop China's next-generation commercial cryptographic algorithm standards.

title: Notice soliciting comments on Public Key Cryptographic Algorithm Submission Requirements and Evaluation Criteria (drafts)
summary: ICCS notice seeking public comment on draft submission requirements and evaluation criteria for the next-generation public-key cryptographic algorithm call, which is framed as a response to quantum computing threats and aims to select algorithms for standardisation.

title: Quantum Information Technology Development and Application Research Report (2023)
summary: Research report by CAICT, the state research institute under MIIT, surveying quantum information technology developments. It covers post-quantum cryptography (PQC) standardisation progress, including NIST PQC algorithm standardisation, alongside global strategy and investment context.
